## Security / Public Context Checklist

- [ ] This PR is public-safe and technically self-contained.
- [ ] This PR does not include non-public issue links, private repository details, prompts, transcripts, workflow logs, credentials, or secrets.
- [ ] `pull_request` / `push` CI does not require provider secrets.
